verse_text: Also, to Joseph in the land of Egypt were born Manasseh and Ephraim, whom Ase-nath, the daughter of Poti-Pherah priest of On, bore to him. Sons were also born to Manasseh: Machir, whom his Syrian concubine bore to him; and Machir begot Gilead. Also, the sons of Ephraim, Ma-nasseh's brother, were Shuthelah and Tahan.

links.context: House of Joseph refers to Joseph's two sons, Ephraim and Manasseh ([[GEN.46:20]]) and their descendants, who were the main tribes of the Northern Kingdom of Israel. By extension, it refers to all of Israel.
